title: AI Automation Mastery
subtitle: Hands-Free AI Workflows That Market, Sell & Serve Your Customers on Autopilot
tagline: 9 Ready-to-Use Workflows | Claude + Gemini + Zapier + n8n

sections.title: Welcome
sections.content: YOUR AI SHOULD WORK WHILE YOU DON'T. You've learned the prompts (Product 1). You've built the Skills and Gems (Product 2). You've deployed complete business systems (Product 3). Now it's time for the final level: automation that runs without you. This guide gives you ready-to-use, step-by-step workflows that connect Claude and Gemini to tools like Zapier and n8n. The result? Your AI writes, responds, follows up, and reports — automatically. You just review the output.

automation_ladder.name: Manual AI
automation_ladder.description: You type prompts one at a time

sections.title: How to Use This Guide
sections.content: Three-step guide to setting up and launching automations.

items.title: Pick a Workflow
items.instruction: Browse by category: Marketing or Customer Service.

items.title: Set Up the Workflow
items.instruction: Follow the step-by-step setup for Zapier OR n8n.

items.title: Customize & Launch
items.instruction: Fill in your [BRACKETS], test once, let it run.

sections.title: Chapter 01: Understanding Automation Platforms
sections.content: THE TWO TOOLS THAT MAKE YOUR AI RUN ON AUTOPILOT

platforms.name: Zapier
platforms.best_for: Non-technical users, quick setup, massive app library
platforms.ai_integrations: Built-in Claude AI and Google Gemini integrations

platforms.name: n8n
platforms.what_it_is: Open-source, self-hostable or cloud, visual workflow builder
platforms.best_for: Users who want more control, complex logic, cost savings
platforms.ai_integrations: Native Claude + Gemini nodes via API keys
platforms.pricing: Free self-hosted; Cloud starts at EUR 20/month

choose_zapier_if: You want the fastest setup (under 10 min)
You need to connect to many different apps
You're okay paying per task as you scale
choose_n8n_if: You want more control over workflows
You're comfortable with slightly more tech
You want to self-host for cost savings

sections.pro_tip: Every workflow in this guide includes setup steps for BOTH platforms. You can start with Zapier for speed, then migrate to n8n later if you want more control.

sections.title: Chapter 02: Your Automation Toolkit Setup
sections.content: GET EVERYTHING CONNECTED IN 30 MINUTES OR LESS
pre_flight_checklist: Google AI Studio API key — aistudio.google.com

zapier_setup.detail: Choose Starter plan or higher for AI actions
Settings > Connections > Search 'Anthropic' > Paste API key
Settings > Connections > Search 'Google AI Studio' > Paste API key
Create test Zap > Add Claude step > Send 'Hello, test!'

n8n_setup.detail: Choose Starter plan, or self-host for free
Settings > Credentials > New > Anthropic > Paste API key
Settings > Credentials > New > Google Gemini > Paste API key
Create new workflow > Add Anthropic node > Execute > Verify

sections.title: Workflow 03: Auto-Generate Social Posts
sections.tagline: FRESH CONTENT EVERY DAY — WITHOUT TOUCHING A KEYBOARD

ai_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You are a social media content creator for [YOUR BUSINESS NAME]. Your brand voice is [PROFESSIONAL/CASUAL/BOLD]. You write for [YOUR INDUSTRY]. RULES: Keep posts under [280 chars for X / 1300 for LinkedIn]. Use 3-5 relevant hashtags. Include a hook in the first line. End with a question or call-to-action. Never use 'In today's fast-paced world'. Reference real audience problems: [PAIN POINTS]. TODAY'S POST — Topic: {{topic}} | Platform: {{platform}} | Tone: {{tone}} | Key message: {{key_message}}. Write the post now.

zapier_setup.detail: Every day at 7:00 AM
Get row from Content Calendar (Status=Pending)
Generate post using topic, platform, tone
Publish post to social media

sections.title: Workflow 04: Email Sequence Generator
sections.tagline: AUTOMATED NURTURE SEQUENCES THAT SOUND LIKE YOU WROTE EACH ONE
sections.why_this_beats_generic_templates: Every email tool has templates. But they're the same for everyone. This workflow generates sequences personalized to each lead — their industry, their pain points, their entry point — using YOUR brand voice.

ai_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You are an email marketing specialist for [YOUR BUSINESS NAME]. BRAND VOICE: [YOUR EMAIL TONE]. PRODUCT: [WHAT YOU SELL] at [PRICE]. UNIQUE VALUE: [WHY CHOOSE YOU]. LEAD: Name: {{lead_name}} | Company: {{company}} | Source: {{lead_source}} | Industry: {{industry}}. Generate a 5-email nurture sequence: EMAIL 1 (Immediate): Welcome + value. EMAIL 2 (Day 3): Educational, no selling. EMAIL 3 (Day 7): Case study for their industry. EMAIL 4 (Day 10): Soft offer with specific benefit. EMAIL 5 (Day 14): Direct offer with urgency. For each: Subject line (<50 chars), Preview text (<90 chars), Body (<200 words), CTA, Send timing.

zapier_setup.detail: New Contact or New detected Subscriber
Generate 5-email nurture sequence
Create row per email with send dates
Send approved emails on schedule

n8n_setup.detail: Fires when new lead enters system
Paste prompt template, map lead data
Write all 5 emails as separate rows

sections.pro_tip: Start with manual approval for the first 10 sequences. Once you trust the output, let it run fully automated.

sections.title: Workflow 05: Content Repurposing Engine
sections.tagline: ONE PIECE OF CONTENT → 10+ PIECES ACROSS EVERY PLATFORM

ai_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You are a content repurposing specialist. You take one piece of long-form content and create multiple shorter pieces. BRAND VOICE: [YOUR VOICE]. BUSINESS: [YOUR NAME]. ORIGINAL CONTENT: {{full_text}}. Create: 1) 5 LinkedIn posts (100-200 words, end with question, 3-5 hashtags). 2) 5 X/Twitter posts (under 280 chars, punchy). 3) 1 Email newsletter intro (100 words, hook + insight). 4) 5 Quote graphics (most quotable lines). Format each with platform headers.

zapier_setup.detail: New blog post published or Google Doc updated
Formatter by Zapier > Extract text from URL or doc
Paste repurposing prompt > Map full text
One row per piece with platform + date columns

sections.title: Workflow 06: Lead Magnet Follow-Up
sections.tagline: TURN EVERY FREE DOWNLOAD INTO A SALES CONVERSATION

ai_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You are a follow-up email specialist for [YOUR BUSINESS NAME]. LEAD MAGNET: {{lead_magnet_name}}. KEY TOPICS: {{key_topics}}. NEXT PAID PRODUCT: {{product_name}} at {{price}}. LEAD: {{name}}. Write 4 emails: EMAIL 1 (Immediate): Deliver download + bonus tip not in the guide. EMAIL 2 (Day 2): Ask if they tried [specific technique]. Quick-win example. No selling. EMAIL 3 (Day 5): Success story. Bridge to paid product. Soft mention only. EMAIL 4 (Day 7): Direct offer for paid product. Specific benefit. Time-limited bonus. Clear CTA.

zapier_setup.detail: New Subscriber with tag = lead magnet name
Follow-up prompt > Map subscriber + lead magnet details
Store all 4 emails with send dates
Queue emails on the generated schedule

sections.title: Workflow 07: Competitor Watch & Alert
sections.tagline: KNOW WHAT YOUR COMPETITORS DO — BEFORE YOUR CUSTOMERS TELL YOU

what_ai_monitors.detail: Blog posts, press releases, product launches
Social media pushes, ad campaigns, promotions
Google, Trustpilot, G2 — opportunities for you
Topics they're publishing — topics to respond to

ai_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You are a competitive intelligence analyst for [YOUR BUSINESS] in [YOUR INDUSTRY]. MY COMPETITORS: 1. [COMPETITOR 1 — name + website] 2. [COMPETITOR 2] 3. [COMPETITOR 3]. WHAT I CARE ABOUT: Pricing changes, new launches, marketing campaigns, negative reviews (opportunities for me), content topics. TODAY'S DATA: {{scraped_content}}. Analyze: 1) ALERT LEVEL: Red Urgent / Yellow Notable / Green Routine. 2) WHAT CHANGED. 3) WHY IT MATTERS. 4) RECOMMENDED ACTION. 5) OPPORTUNITY to exploit. If nothing significant: respond 'NO SIGNIFICANT CHANGES TODAY.'

setup_steps.detail: RSS for competitor blogs + Google Alerts for brand mentions
Pull latest from competitor websites and review sites
Send competitor data through analysis prompt
IF response != 'NO SIGNIFICANT CHANGES' then continue
Send summary to your preferred notification channel

sections.title: Workflow 08: Smart Inquiry Auto-Responder
sections.tagline: RESPOND TO EVERY CUSTOMER INQUIRY IN UNDER 60 SECONDS — 24/7

classifier_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You are a customer inquiry classifier for [YOUR BUSINESS]. Read the incoming message and classify: SALES (pricing, demos, quotes), SUPPORT (existing customer issues), GENERAL (partnerships, media, jobs), SPAM (irrelevant). Also extract: URGENCY (High/Medium/Low), CUSTOMER_NAME, KEY_QUESTION, SUMMARY. INCOMING: {{message_body}} FROM: {{sender_email}} SUBJECT: {{subject}}. Respond in JSON format only.

response_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You are a customer service rep for [YOUR BUSINESS]. WHAT WE SELL: [PRODUCTS/SERVICES]. PRICING: [STRUCTURE]. HOURS: [BUSINESS HOURS]. BOOKING: [LINK]. INQUIRY: Category: {{category}} | Name: {{customer_name}} | Question: {{key_question}} | Original: {{original_message}}. Write a professional, warm response that: 1) Addresses by name. 2) Acknowledges their question. 3) Provides a helpful answer. 4) Includes a clear next step. 5) Feels personal, NOT like a bot. Under 150 words. Sign off as [YOUR NAME].

zapier_setup.detail: New inquiry arrives
Classify: Sales / Support / General / Spam
Only continue if NOT Spam
Generate personalized response
Send reply to customer
Create/update contact record

sections.title: Workflow 09: Client Onboarding Automation
sections.tagline: PROFESSIONAL ONBOARDING IN MINUTES — NOT DAYS

ai_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You are an onboarding specialist for [YOUR BUSINESS]. Create personalized onboarding docs. SERVICE: {{service_name}}. CLIENT: {{client_name}} at {{company_name}} in {{industry}}. START: {{start_date}}. Generate: 1) WELCOME: Personalized message + what to expect in first 7 days + key contacts. 2) CHECKLIST: Step-by-step for them + what we need from them + deadlines. 3) TIMELINE: Week 1-4 milestones. 4) FAQ: 5 common questions with answers. 5) NEXT STEPS: Book kickoff [LINK], complete intake [LINK], join channel [LINK].

zapier_setup.node: Stripe: New Payment OR CRM Deal Won / PayPal New Sale

zapier_setup.detail: Generate onboarding doc from template
Create doc + send welcome email with links
Update client status to Onboarding

sections.title: Workflow 10: Review & Testimonial Collector
sections.tagline: AUTOMATICALLY COLLECT AND SHOWCASE YOUR BEST CLIENT FEEDBACK

request_email_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You write review request emails for [YOUR BUSINESS] that feel personal and genuine — never pushy. CLIENT: {{client_name}}. SERVICE: {{service_name}}. DURATION: {{duration}}. RESULTS: {{results_delivered}}. Write a short, warm email (under 100 words) asking for a review. Reference specific results you delivered. Make it easy — offer 3 questions: 1) What was your situation before working with us? 2) What specific results did you see? 3) Would you recommend us? Why?

testimonial_formatter_prompt.prompt: Take this raw customer feedback and create 3 versions: RAW: {{raw_feedback}}. VERSION 1 — WEBSITE (2-3 sentences, impactful, with attribution). VERSION 2 — SOCIAL MEDIA (1 sentence, punchy, shareable). VERSION 3 — CASE STUDY INTRO (3-4 sentences, story format: problem > solution > result).

setup_steps.detail: Project marked 'Complete' or X days after purchase
Personalized to their project and results
Gmail or email tool sends the review request
When they reply or submit the review form
Add to your Testimonial Library with all versions

sections.title: Workflow 11: Follow-Up & Re-Engagement
sections.tagline: NEVER LOSE A CUSTOMER TO SILENCE AGAIN

three_workflows.label: A: LEAD FOLLOW-UP
three_workflows.description: Scan CRM weekly > Find leads inactive 7+ days > AI check-in > Send

three_workflows.label: B: POST-PURCHASE
three_workflows.description: 30/60/90 days after purchase > AI value-check email > Send

three_workflows.label: C: WIN-BACK
three_workflows.description: Customers inactive 90+ days > AI re-engagement offer > Send

lead_follow_up_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You write follow-up emails for [YOUR BUSINESS]. LEAD: {{lead_name}} at {{company}}. LAST CONTACT: {{last_date}} — {{last_type}}. DAYS INACTIVE: {{days}}. Write a brief follow-up (under 100 words): 1) Reference last interaction. 2) Offer something valuable. 3) Ask one simple question. 4) Soft CTA. DO NOT use 'just checking in' or 'touching base'.

win_back_prompt.prompt: SYSTEM: You write win-back emails for [YOUR BUSINESS]. CUSTOMER: {{name}}. LAST PURCHASE: {{date}} — {{product}}. DAYS SINCE: {{days}}. Write a re-engagement email (under 120 words): 1) Acknowledge the gap without guilt. 2) Share something new. 3) Offer exclusive 'welcome back' incentive. 4) Gentle urgency. Tone: Warm, not desperate.

zapier_setup.detail: Scan CRM for inactive leads/customers
Filter by last activity date > threshold
Generate personalized email follow-up
Send the follow-up automatically
Record that follow-up was sent

sections.title: Chapter 12: Automation Dashboard
sections.content: SEE ALL YOUR AUTOMATIONS IN ONE PLACE

weekly_summary_prompt.prompt: Here is my automation dashboard data for this week: {{dashboard_data}}. Generate a weekly report: 1) TOTAL TIME SAVED. 2) MOST ACTIVE workflow. 3) ANY ERRORS needing attention. 4) OPTIMIZATION SUGGESTIONS. 5) ROI ESTIMATE: Time saved x $[YOUR_HOURLY_RATE] = value generated.

for_each_active_workflow: Review AI output quality — still accurate?
Check error logs — any recurring failures?
Test with edge cases — handling unusual inputs?
scaling_questions: Which workflow saves the most time? Can I expand it?
Which has the most errors? Fix or replace?
What manual task am I still doing? New workflow needed?
Am I under API budget? Add more automations
Am I over API budget? Switch models or reduce frequency

sections.title: Chapter 13: Troubleshooting & Optimization
sections.content: FIX PROBLEMS FAST. MAKE GOOD AUTOMATIONS GREAT.

common_issues.fix: Add your Business Profile to every prompt
Check API key + billing on provider dashboard
Add 3 example emails in YOUR voice to the prompt
Add a 'clean data' step before AI processes
Always feed real data, never ask AI to guess

optimization_strategies.name: Model Selection
optimization_strategies.description: Use cheaper models (claude-haiku, gemini-flash) for simple tasks; expensive for complex.

optimization_strategies.name: Batching
optimization_strategies.description: Process multiple items in one AI call instead of one at a time.

optimization_strategies.name: Caching
optimization_strategies.description: Store repeated AI responses to avoid redundant API calls.

optimization_strategies.name: Pre-Filtering
optimization_strategies.description: Add conditional logic to only send relevant data to AI.

optimization_strategies.name: Prompt Engineering
optimization_strategies.description: More specific prompts = better output = fewer retries = lower cost.

items.description: All 4 products | Separately: $162 | Save $15. AI Starter Kit + AI Skills Builder + AI for Small Business + AI Automation Mastery.
